Related Entities

  • hospital SSM HEALTH ST AGNES HOSPITAL-FOND DU LAC 4-star overall rating
  • hospital RIPON MEDICAL CENTER
  • hospital WAUPUN MEMORIAL HOSPITAL
  • hospital FOND DU LAC COUNTY ACUTE PSYCH UNIT
  • snf Avina of Fond du Lac 2-star, 50 beds
  • snf EDENBROOK OF FOND DU LAC 3-star, 90 beds
  • snf Avina on Division 3-star, 50 beds
  • snf HARBOR HAVEN HEALTH & REHABILITATION 5-star, 85 beds
  • snf WHISPERING PINES NURSING AND REHAB, LLC 4-star, 50 beds
  • snf ST FRANCIS HOME 3-star, 90 beds
  • snf FOND DU LAC LUTHERAN HOME 1-star, 85 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026) CDC SDOH Measures for County (2017-2021)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
